_doc: Per-image Gemini prompts for The Conversational Forms Playbook. {palette} resolves at runtime. Follows feedback_image_prompt_construction.md rules.

cover.prompt:
Editorial book cover for a downloadable lead magnet PDF. Aspect: portrait, 3:4, US letter book cover proportions.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES (read first):
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed under TEXT TO RENDER below. No other text. No font names. No instructions. No labels beyond what is listed.
2. Never render the words "Inter", "Inter Regular", "Inter Display Bold", "JetBrains Mono", "sans serif", or any typography or font instruction inside the image.
3. Spell every rendered word exactly as written, character for character. No garbled or distorted characters. No misspellings.

TEXT TO RENDER (exactly these pieces, nothing else):
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase, two words: FREE PLAYBOOK
B. Upper-left massive headline across three lines: line 1 reads "The", line 2 reads "Conversational", line 3 reads "Forms Playbook".
C. Subtitle inside a horizontal off-white translucent panel below the headline, two lines: line 1 reads "The psychology behind why one question at a", line 2 reads "time converts three to four times better."
D. Below the subtitle panel, a small uppercase label, three words: INSIDE THIS PLAYBOOK
E. A grid of 8 small pills below the INSIDE THIS PLAYBOOK label, arranged as 2 rows of 4 pills. The 4 pills in the top row read, left to right: "Fogg B=MAP", "Cognitive Load", "Zeigarnik", "One Question". The 4 pills in the bottom row read, left to right: "Progressive Reveal", "Micro-Copy", "Social Proof", "Ethics".
F. Bottom-left small wordmark: AI BrandFactory

TYPOGRAPHY (apply these settings; do not display the setting names):
- Headline: massive bold sans-serif display face, off-white #FAF9FF, tight letter spacing.
- Subtitle: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B color, centered inside the off-white panel.
- Top-left pill text: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- INSIDE THIS PLAYBOOK label: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4, small.
- Pill grid text: clean sans-serif medium weight, off-white #FAF9FF, small. Each pill is a rounded rectangle with a thin bright cyan #06B6D4 outline and a translucent dark indigo fill. Pills are uniformly sized.
- Wordmark: clean light-weight sans-serif, off-white.

Design language:
- Premium funnel-art style in the spirit of Peng Joon and Russell Brunson, stripped of ornament. Editorial restraint, not hype.
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient at 135 degrees, with a subtle radial bloom of bright cyan in the upper right.
- Layout: the headline and subtitle occupy the upper half of the frame, left-aligned. The INSIDE THIS PLAYBOOK label and pill grid occupy the middle to lower portion of the frame, also left-aligned.
- A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan, upper-right to middle-left.
- Subtle grain texture across the whole frame to feel print-grade.

Color palette: {palette}.

What to avoid:
- No human faces, no avatars, no chat bubble icons, no form icons, no cursor icons, no any icons inside the pills (pills contain text labels only, no icons).
- No code text rendered legibly anywhere.
- No stock photos, no decorative AI illustrations, no emoji, no clip art.
- No gradients other than the indigo to purple base.
- No additional pills, badges, or text beyond the 8 listed.
- No literal Typeform, Tally, or other form-tool brand logos.

Output: a single high-quality cover image, print-ready, 4K.

hero.prompt:
Wide hero banner for a high-converting squeeze page that gives away "The Conversational Forms Playbook". Aspect: 16:9 widescreen.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES (read first):
- This image contains NO rendered text.
- Do not render font names, typography labels, or instructions anywhere.

Composition: a 3D-rendered isometric mockup of a US-letter PDF cover floating slightly tilted on the right third of the frame, casting a soft drop shadow onto a textured editorial background. The PDF cover shows the same playbook design (pill grid of 8 concept labels visible on the PDF). On the left two-thirds: a faint repeating question-bubble motif in #06B6D4 at 12 percent opacity (abstract rounded rectangles of varying proportions stacked vertically, suggesting a chat-like question flow). A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan crosses the upper third.

Background:
- Top half: deep indigo #1A0B4B fading to electric purple #7C3AED.
- Bottom half: off-white #FAF9FF with a faint mesh gradient bloom.
- The PDF mockup sits on the dividing line between the two halves.
- Subtle paper grain across the whole frame.

Style:
- Premium editorial. Russell Brunson book-cover-on-a-shelf energy, restrained.
- No people, no faces, no stock photography, no chat UI screenshots, no code text.
- No icons or clip art beyond the implied decorative question-bubble motif.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single 4K hero image.

og.prompt:
Open Graph social share card image, 1.91:1 widescreen aspect.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES (read first):
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed under TEXT TO RENDER below. No other text. No font names. No instructions.
2. Never render the words "Inter", "Inter Regular", "Inter Display Bold", "JetBrains Mono", "sans serif", or any typography or font instruction inside the image.
3. Spell every rendered word exactly as written, character for character. No misspellings.

TEXT TO RENDER (exactly these pieces, nothing else):
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase, two words: AI BRANDFACTORY
B. Centered massive headline across two lines: line 1 reads "The Conversational", line 2 reads "Forms Playbook".
C. Below the headline, inside a horizontal off-white rounded pill, one line of subtitle text: Why one question at a time converts three to four times better
D. Below the subtitle pill, a single horizontal text strip showing the concepts covered, separated by middle-dot bullets, all on one line: Fogg B=MAP · Cognitive Load · Zeigarnik · Progressive Reveal · Micro-Copy · Social Proof · Ethics
E. Bottom-right small label, slightly faded: files.aibrandfactory.com

TYPOGRAPHY (apply these settings; do not display the setting names):
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Headline: massive bold sans-serif display face, off-white #FAF9FF.
- Subtitle: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside the off-white pill.
- Concepts text strip: clean medium-weight sans-serif, bright cyan #06B6D4, smaller size than the subtitle, centered horizontally below the subtitle pill.
- Bottom-right label: clean sans-serif, off-white at 70% opacity.

Background: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient at 135 degrees, with a faded question-bubble motif on the right third in bright cyan at low opacity (decorative only). A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan crosses the upper third from top-right to mid-left.

What to avoid:
- No people, no faces, no chat UI screenshots, no clip art, no emoji.
- No literal Typeform or form-tool brand logos.
- No additional text beyond the pieces listed above.

Crisp print-grade typography. Color palette: {palette}.

Output: sharp, ready as og:image.

notion-cover.prompt:
Wide editorial banner image for a Notion page header. Aspect ratio 21:9, ultra-wide cinematic.

CRITICAL CONSTRAINT: Notion overlays its own title text on top of this banner. The image must contain NO title, NO headline, NO wordmark, NO logo, NO labels in the corners. All four corners must be free of any text or text-like marks.

Do not render font names, typography labels, or technical instructions anywhere in the image.

Composition:
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B on the left fading to electric purple #7C3AED on the right, with a subtle bright cyan #06B6D4 bloom in the upper right.
- Across the entire frame edge-to-edge, an abstract horizontal conversation-flow composition: a sequence of 7 to 9 rounded rectangle shapes of varying proportions (some wider, some narrower, some taller, some shorter) arranged in a left-to-right flow, alternating above and below an imaginary horizontal center line to suggest a back-and-forth conversation. Each rectangle is a clean off-white outline on the indigo-to-purple background. Thin off-white connecting arrows or curved lines between the rectangles suggest the flow from one to the next.
- A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan crosses the upper portion from upper-left to mid-right.
- Subtle paper grain texture across the whole frame.

What to avoid:
- No corner text. No corner pill. No corner badge. No wordmark anywhere.
- No headline text.
- No literal Typeform or form-tool brand logos.
- No human faces, no avatars, no chat app UI screenshots.
- No text or labels inside any of the rectangles.
- No emoji, no clip art, no icons other than the geometric rounded-rectangle shapes described.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 4K cinematic banner.
